top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Drop, Oil Gains on Fresh Iran Strikes: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian equities eased from all-time highs after conflicting signals from the US and Iran on prospects for a deal to end the war. Crude oil gained.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ECB will do what is necessary to keep inflation on target, says official
top_signals.summary: The European Central Bank will take necessary action to bring inflation back to its 2% target, Bank of France Governor Francois Villeroy de Galhau said. Speaking to CNBC in Singapore, Villeroy de Galhau, a member of the ECB’s Governing Council, sought to reassure markets amid rising inflation concerns tied to the Iran war. “If I ...

top_signals.title: Floating Solar Could Be a Lifeline for Land-Scarce Nations Facing Energy Crises
top_signals.summary: Floating solar farms could be significantly more efficient than solar farms on land thanks to the natural cooling effects of seawater, according to new findings from a comparative study conducted by researchers from the National Taipei University of Technology (NTUT) in Taiwan. The floating solar panels used in the study produced 12 percent more energy than the on-land models, with potentially huge implications for global energy security and decarbonization pathways. The study, published this month in the Journal of Renewable and Sustainable Energy,…

top_signals.title: Hormuz reopening unlikely to quickly unwind LNG supply backlog: lawyers
top_signals.summary: Middle East LNG exporters could spend years resolving contractual disputes and restoring missed deliveries after LNG tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz resumes, with a backlog of claims potentially affecting cargo programming well into 2027, contract lawyers have told Platts. “A key question remains whether base volumes are restored first, or whether deferred and ...

top_signals.title: Ship Recycling Market Softened Last Week
top_signals.summary: The ship recycling market has been relatively quiet over the past week. alerts.title: Government and regulators must remove their barriers to offshore charging uptake in offshore wind
alerts.summary: A cross-industry coalition, including Bibby Marine, offshore wind developers, vessel operators and technology providers, is calling for urgent action to accelerate the decarbonisation of offshore wind operations. A new position paper reveals the sector-wide benefits of offshore vessel electrification and asks government and regulators to remove their barriers to the development of offshore charging. The ...
